hero.title: Math olympiads, reimagined
hero.subtitle: Compete, learn, and have fun with real problems from international competitions. For students aged 8 to 14.

step1.title: Sign up free
step1.description: In less than 2 minutes. No credit card, no strings attached.

step2.title: Solve problems
step2.description: Practice with hundreds of problems or join an official competition.

step3.title: Earn medals
step3.description: Download your certificate, climb the leaderboard, and show the world.

schools.title: Schools already trusting Numoria
schools.subtitle: Join the first institutions transforming math education in Latin America.

auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to continue your math adventure.
auth.registerSubtitle: No credit card required. The first 3 competitions are on us.
auth.name: Name
auth.magicLinkSent: We sent a code to {email}. Check your inbox and paste it below.
auth.magicLinkExpired: This link has expired. Request a new one.

verifyCode.title: Check your email
verifyCode.description: We sent you a 6-digit code. Find it in the email and paste it below. (You can also click the link in the email if you prefer.)
verifyCode.label: 6-digit code
verifyCode.errorInvalid: Invalid or expired code. Check your email or request a new one.
verifyCode.errorGeneric: We couldn't verify the code. Please try again.

auth.checkEmailDescription: We sent you a magic link. Click the button in the email to log in — you can close this window.
auth.checkSpam: Don't see it? Check your spam folder.
auth.termsAcceptance: By continuing you agree to the <terms>Terms</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>.

errors.callbackFailed: We couldn't complete your sign-in. Please try again.
errors.providerError: The auth service had a hiccup. Try again in a few seconds.
errors.rateLimit: Too many attempts. Wait a moment before trying again.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.notFound: We couldn't find what you're looking for.
errors.unauthorized: You don't have permission for this.

student.title: Tell us about yourself
student.subtitle: We just need a few details to personalize your math experience.
student.countryHelp: We auto-detect your country, but you can change it.
student.birthDateHelp: Just month and year (no full date, for your privacy).
student.inviteCodeHelp: If your teacher gave you an 8-letter code, enter it. You can also do this later.

errors.submitFailed: Couldn't save your info. Try again.

parent.title: Set up your family account
parent.subtitle: Add your children so they can compete. You can add up to 4.
parent.childEmailHelp: If they don't have an email, use one of your aliases (e.g.: dad+sofia@gmail.com).
parent.atLeastOneChild: You must add at least one child

parentDone.title: All set!
parentDone.subtitle: We sent {count, plural, =1 {1 invitation} other {# invitations}} to your children. Once they open their email and click the link, they can start competing.
parentDone.checkInbox: Check your own inbox too — you'll get a copy of each invitation.

teacher.title: Register your school
teacher.subtitle: This info appears in certificates, institutional ranking, and your school's public page.
teacher.schoolNamePlaceholder: E.g.: International School of San Pedro
teacher.schoolSlugHelp: Your public page will be numoria.app/schools/{slug}. Auto-generated, but you can edit it.
teacher.primaryColorHelp: Used for accents in your team's dashboard. Default: Numoria blue.
teacher.logoHelp: PNG, JPEG, WebP, or SVG. Maximum 512KB. Will appear on your students' certificates.
teacher.unverifiedNote: Your school remains "unverified" until Numoria's admin approves it (1-2 days).

teacherErrors.nameTooShort: Name must be at least 2 characters
teacherErrors.slugInvalid: URL can only contain lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens
teacherErrors.slugTaken: That URL is already taken. Try another one.
teacherErrors.logoTypeInvalid: File type not allowed (PNG, JPEG, WebP, or SVG)
teacherErrors.createFailed: Couldn't create the school. Try again.

student.noTeamTitle: You're not in a team yet
student.noTeamDescription: Ask your teacher for the 8-letter team code and paste it here.
student.joinError: That code is not valid. Ask your teacher for the right one.
student.streak: {days, plural, =0 {No streak} =1 {1 day in a row} other {# days in a row}}
student.comingSoon: Competitions and problems land in the next phase 🚀

parent.maxChildrenReached: You've added the maximum of 4 children.
parent.noChildrenYet: You haven't added any children yet.

teacher.summary: {teamCount, plural, =1 {1 team} other {# teams}} · {studentCount, plural, =0 {no students} =1 {1 student} other {# students}}
teacher.actionContestsDesc: Open sessions, view results, print sheets

contests.listSubtitle: Compete with real problems. Earn points. Climb the ranking.

sections.empty: No contests in this section yet.

card.awaitingTeacher: Waiting for your teacher to open the contest

openSession.modalSubtitle: Your students can take it only during this session.
openSession.durationHint: Contest default: {defaultMin} min. You can adjust within the calendar window.

preview.title: Upcoming contests
preview.noneActive: No active contests right now. Check back soon.

take.submitError: We couldn't submit your contest. Please try again.
take.confirmBody: You answered {answered} out of {total} problems. Once submitted, you can't change your answers.

results.title: Results — {contestTitle}
results.notSubmittedYet: You haven't submitted this contest yet.

leaderboard.title: Leaderboard — {contestTitle}

table.paperEntryTooltip: Answers entered by teacher via manual entry

grantRetry.tooltip: Grant another attempt to this student
grantRetry.modalBody: This deletes {studentName}'s current attempt. They can re-take the contest while the session is still open.
grantRetry.warningDestructive: Irreversible action. The student's current answers will be lost.

leaderboard.noTeams: You don't have teams yet. Create one to see leaderboards.
leaderboard.noAttempts: No student from your teams has attempted this contest yet.

paperEntry.title: Paper entry — {contestTitle}
paperEntry.subtitle: Team: {teamName}
paperEntry.readyCount: {count} student(s) with answers ready to submit
paperEntry.emptyHint: Fill in at least one answer to submit
paperEntry.errorNoEntries: No answers to submit — fill in at least one cell
paperEntry.noTeamsBody: Create a team first to use paper entry.
paperEntry.noSessionBody: To use paper entry, first open a contest session from the contests list.
paperEntry.noMembersBody: Invite students to your team to enter their answers.
paperEntry.confirmBody: This will create attempts for {count} student(s). Once submitted you cannot modify (but you can use 'Grant retry' per student).

print.instructionAnswers: Write your answer clearly and completely in the space provided

new.title: Create your first team
new.subtitle: Your students will join with an invite code. You can create more teams later.
new.name: Team name
new.maxMembersHelp: Default: 35. Up to 100 students per team.

errors.nameTooLong: Name must be at most 100 characters
errors.noSchool: You must register your school before creating teams.
errors.createFailed: Couldn't create the team. Try again.

view.shareTitle: Share the code with your students
view.shareSubtitle: When they enter this code at /onboarding or visit /join they'll join your team.
view.regenerateConfirm: Sure? Students with the old code won't be able to join. Those already in the team stay.
view.membersEmpty: No one has joined yet. Share the code.
view.memberCount: {count, plural, =0 {No members} =1 {1 member} other {# members}} of {max}

join.loginRequired: Sign in or register to join
join.successSubtitle: You can now participate in your team's competitions.
join.errorWrongRole: Only students can join teams. Your current account is a {role}.
join.errorFull: This team has reached its maximum capacity.
join.errorAlreadyMember: You're already a member of this team.
join.errorOnboardingPending: Finish your registration before joining the team.
join.errorGeneric: Couldn't join the team. Try again.

metadata.title: Numoria Challenge — Online math olympiads
metadata.description: Math olympiad platform for students aged 8 to 14. Compete, practice, and earn medals. 3 free competitions, no card needed.
